scenarios.title: Directory.Build.props uses LangVersion latest without justification
scenarios.expected: Expected finding to prefer default or justified pin.
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-build-conventions. Scenario: Directory.Build.props uses LangVersion latest without justification. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected finding to prefer default or justified pin.

scenarios.title: Noisy repo with TreatWarningsAsErrors true globally
scenarios.prompt: Use sharp-build-conventions. Scenario: Noisy repo with TreatWarningsAsErrors true globally. Review the supplied or implied codebase evidence and produce the expected behavior: Expected staged rollout recommendation.
